metadata.title: Tilahun Kebede | Secure Software & Cybersecurity Portfolio

hero.eyebrow: 7+ years across software development and cybersecurity
hero.headline: Senior .NET Software Developer and Cybersecurity Specialist with 7+ years of combined experience in development, IAM, and penetration testing.
hero.description: I design and build applications that solve real enterprise problems, then strengthen them through identity-first security and practical vulnerability testing.

about.heading: About Me
about.description: I combine strong software engineering foundations with practical cybersecurity expertise to deliver systems that are reliable, scalable, and secure.
about.paragraph: I have more than five years of experience in software development, primarily with the .NET framework, where I built and improved applications that solved enterprise business problems. Over the years, I expanded into cybersecurity, with hands-on experience in identity and access management and penetration testing to reduce risk and improve security posture.
items: Enterprise application development in .NET with focus on maintainability and business impact
Identity and access management across governance, authentication, authorization, and lifecycle
Penetration testing for web applications and enterprise environments
Clear, actionable security recommendations that support practical remediation
about.cardHeading: Builds enterprise software with security built in
about.cardText: Strong fit for roles requiring .NET development experience, IAM capability, and practical penetration testing.

skills.heading: Skills
skills.description: A focused skill set across software development, identity security, and offensive security testing.

items.title: .NET Software Development
items.description: Enterprise application development with focus on clean architecture, maintainability, performance, and secure implementation.

items.title: Identity & Access Management
items.description: IAM governance, SSO, MFA, RBAC, least privilege, access reviews, and identity lifecycle management.

items.title: Penetration Testing
items.description: Web application and network testing, vulnerability validation, security reporting, and remediation guidance.

experience.heading: Experience
experience.description: Professional experience spanning software development and cybersecurity, with current focus on IAM and penetration testing.

items.title: Cybersecurity Professional
items.details: Focused on cybersecurity with specialization in IAM and penetration testing, helping organizations strengthen access controls, identify vulnerabilities, and prioritize effective remediation.

items.title: IAM & Penetration Testing
items.details: Contributed to IAM and penetration testing initiatives across access governance, authentication security, vulnerability assessment, and actionable risk reduction.

items.title: .NET Software Developer
items.details: Developed and maintained .NET applications that solved enterprise operational problems, improved workflows, and delivered measurable business value.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.description: Selected work that reflects my development background and current cybersecurity focus.

items.title: Enterprise Application Delivery (.NET)
items.description: Designed and delivered .NET-based business applications that addressed enterprise requirements and improved process efficiency.

items.title: Enterprise IAM Implementation
items.description: Implemented and supported enterprise IAM and SSO integration using federated authentication flows (OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect, and SAML), alongside MFA and role-based access controls to improve both security and user productivity.

items.title: Web Application Penetration Testing
items.description: Performed OWASP Top 10 vulnerability assessments on web applications using manual testing with Burp Suite and automated security testing, then provided practical remediation guidance grounded in software engineering experience.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description: Open to opportunities in software development, IAM, and penetration testing.

footer.text: (c) 2026 Tilahun Kebede. Software development, IAM, and penetration testing.
